applicationWindow.notes: Jan 31 fell on a Saturday for 2026, deadline rolled to Monday Feb 2. Do not confuse with the May 31 resident general-season deadline.

nr.notes: NR Type 1 general elk tag ~$692. Type 1/2/9 license structure is complex; verify your hunt area's license type at wgfd.wyo.gov.

pointSystem.notes: 75% of NR tags go to highest-point applicants, 25% allocated random — even new applicants have a small chance. Some general areas draw at 5–8 points.
